title: Title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 17-F.  LOUISIANA CENTERS OF

EXCELLENCE FINANCING CORPORATION ACT

§1800.21.  Title

This Chapter shall be referred to and may be cited as the "Louisiana Centers of Excellence Financing Corporation Act".

Acts 2010, No. 556, §1.
